Address.title: Address
Address.description: A street oriented addressing structure supporting delivery

postcode.title: postcode
postcode.description: Postcode or postal code for the address.

city.title: city
city.description: Postal city name of the address.

AddressLine.title: AddressLine
AddressLine.description: A class defining information concerning one line of a postal address.

order.title: order
order.description: The sequence order that the address line element should be displayed in

type.title: type
type.description: The type for the address line element

text.title: text
text.description: Free-text description for the address line element

AddressLineTypeEnum.title: AddressLineTypeEnum
AddressLineTypeEnum.description: A list of supported address line types.

FacilityLocation.title: FacilityLocation
FacilityLocation.description: A location for which a time zone and an address can be specified

timeZone.title: timeZone
timeZone.description: The time zone the facility is located in.

NamedAreaCode.title: NamedAreaCode
NamedAreaCode.description: Type for a short numeric or alphanumeric code identifying an area.

NamedAreaExtended.title: NamedAreaExtended
NamedAreaExtended.description: A named area with an additional code (that is not an ISO subdivision code)

namedAreaCode.title: namedAreaCode
namedAreaCode.description: Code for the named area, such a postal code or other code assigned for administration.
